purpose: A .NET testing utility library providing tools for unit and integration testing in COS services
businessFeatures: Mocking of repositories and database access

dataEntities.name: Generic repositories
dataEntities.description: Support for mocking IRepository<T> and ICachingRepository<T> interfaces from Afterman.nRepo

ambiguities: The exact nature of the 'COS services' that this library is designed to support is unclear
The 'Crb.Cos' namespace suggests this is part of a larger ecosystem but the relationships aren't defined
The DomainTranslators implementation references types like 'Account', 'Partner', but these domain models are not provided
